executives.name: Melissa Holzberger
executives.background: Ms Holzberger is a commercial lawyer with over 20 years’ experience in the resources and energy sectors. She has held senior legal and board positions with several ASX-listed companies and government organisations. She has extensive experience in corporate governance and risk management.

executives.name: Susie Corlett
executives.background: Susie Corlett was appointed to the Board in June 2020. She is a geologist with over 25 years’ experience in exploration, mining operations and investment banking.
